message:
test(frankensqlite): comprehensive test suite for BEGIN CONCURRENT, transactions, and Connection trait

Add 25+ tests covering the full FrankenConnection API surface:

BEGIN CONCURRENT: basic insert+commit, rollback semantics, parameterized
operations, bulk insert (100 rows), and nested savepoint with
release/rollback-to behavior.

Isolation levels: verify Serializable maps to EXCLUSIVE, ReadUncommitted
maps to DEFERRED, double-begin returns error, commit/rollback without
begin returns error.

Error mapping: invalid SQL returns QueryError with Syntax/Database kind,
WriteConflict maps to Deadlock, SerializationFailure maps to Deadlock.

Column inference edge cases: star select, table-qualified columns, CTEs,
subquery aliases, no-FROM selects, PRAGMA database_list/integrity_check/
simple-value column names.

File-based connections: open, write, close, reopen, verify data persists.

Connection trait async bridge: query via asupersync runtime block_on,
begin+commit via Transaction trait, drop-without-commit auto-rollback.

Batch execution: multiple INSERT statements via Connection::batch.

Value round-trips: NULL and BLOB (including 0x00 bytes) via parameterized
insert and select.

changes() and last_insert_rowid() smoke tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
